introSection: Mine de Thor, previously known as Zig Zag and then Scratch, is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Walygator Sud-Ouest in Roquefort, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Mine de Thor, previously known as Zig Zag and then Scratch, is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Walygator Sud-Ouest in Roquefort, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
